answer.content:
Floyd-Warshall Algorithm

                
                    function floydWarshall(graph) {
                        const n = graph.length;
                        for (let k = 0; k < n; k++) {
                            for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
                                for (let j = 0; j < n; j++) {
                                    if (graph[i][k] > graph[i][j] || graph[i][k] === 0 || graph[k][j] === 0) {
                                        graph[i][j] = graph[i][k];
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                        }
                        return graph;
                    }
